title: pelargonium × splendidum
intro: Pelargonium × splendidum, also known as the Rose Geranium or Splendid Geranium, is a hybrid species of flowering plant within the family Geraniaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to balance hormones and reduce stress, and it contains compounds such as geraniol and linalool, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include its ability to ease symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, improve digestion, and reduce menstrual cramps, making it a popular herbal remedy for women's health issues. In herbal preparations, Pelargonium × splendidum is often used in essential oils, teas, and tinctures, and can be used topically or internally to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
